description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and caches the node_modules directory. Define three stages: test, publish, and release, and run a before_script that updates apk, installs jq and yarn, and runs yarn install for every job. In the test stage add a test job that runs yarn run test. In the publish stage add a publish:npm job that runs npm run build && npm run make:binaries, writes an .npmrc containing the NPM_TOKEN, then publishes the package with npm publish --access=public, and it only runs on version tags matching the pattern vX.Y.Z (excluding branch builds). In the release stage add two jobs: release:docker.io that extracts the package version via jq, logs into Docker Hub with DOCKER_REGISTRY_USER and DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the Docker image tagged with DOCKER_REGISTRY_IMAGE and pushes it; and release:gitlab that similarly extracts the version, logs into the GitLab Container Registry with CI_REGISTRY_USER and CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, builds the image tagged with CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE and pushes it, both jobs running only on version tags matching vX.Y.Z and not on branches.
